notifications.trade_accepted: {name} accepted the trade — accept yours to finalise

award_modal.title: Manage points for {name}
award_modal.amount_help: Adding credits balance + lifetime; removing debits the balance only (lifetime is preserved).

trades_page.title: Trades
trades_page.subtitle: Trade decorations and points with other users. Both sides must accept before a trade completes.
trades_page.no_permission: Your group doesn't have permission to start trades. Contact an admin if this should change.
trades_page.history_empty: No completed or cancelled trades yet.
trades_page.start_help: Type the username (or display name) of who you want to trade with.
trades_page.start_search_failed: Couldn't search for users. Check your connection and try again.

shop.title: Rewards
shop.subtitle: Spend your points on decorations and perks.
shop.tiers_help: Unlock groups automatically when you reach the lifetime threshold, or buy access directly with your point balance.
shop.badge_ends_in_days: {count, plural, one {Ends in # day} other {Ends in # days}}
shop.badge_ends_in_hours: {count, plural, one {Ends in # hour} other {Ends in # hours}}

submit.intro: Design your own decoration. Once submitted, an admin reviews and either approves it (it then appears in the shop) or rejects it.
submit.image_file_help: PNG / GIF / WebP / APNG up to 4 MB. The file goes through the same validation as admin uploads.
submit.image_url_help: Direct https:// URL to a PNG / GIF / WebP / APNG.
submit.custom_css_help: Optional. Use `&` as a selector placeholder. CSS is sanitised on save.
submit.moderation_notice: Your submission goes to an admin for review before it appears in the shop.
submit.submitted_alert: Submission sent. An admin will review it shortly.

trade.no_items_yet: Optional — empty is fine if you only want to send points (or nothing at all).
trade.picker_empty: No more items available to add.
trade.persist_hint: Your offer is saved automatically. Close anytime — the trade waits in your trades list and reopens with everything intact.
trade.status_pending: Add items / points and both press Accept to seal the trade.
trade.error_recipient_owns_item: Trade refused: the other side already owns one of the items you offered. Remove it from the offer and try again.
trade.error_not_both_accepted: The other side cancelled their acceptance. Re-check the offer and accept again to retry.
trade.error_insufficient_points: Trade refused: one of the sides no longer has enough points to honour the offer.
trade.error_item_unavailable: Trade refused: one of the offered items is no longer in its declared owner's inventory. Refresh and rebuild the offer.
trade.accepted_waiting_alert: You accepted your side. The trade is pending until the other party accepts — you can leave this window and come back later.
trade.error_initiator_insufficient_points: You don't have enough points to cover your offer.
trade.error_recipient_insufficient_points: The other side doesn't have enough points.
trade.error_duplicate_with_other_side: The other side already added that item.
trade.error_too_many: Too many items in the offer.
trade.error_item_equipped: You can't trade an item that is currently equipped. Unequip it from My decorations and try again.

my_decorations.title: My decorations
my_decorations.name: Name styles
my_decorations.none: You don't own any decorations of this kind yet.

admin.confirm_delete: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.

cover.title: Profile covers
cover.help: Shop-sold profile banners. Static and animated formats supported (PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP, APNG).
cover.field_image_help: Up to 6MB. Animated formats: GIF, APNG, WebP.

users.title: Users & points
users.help: Browse every user with their current balance and lifetime totals.

rules.title: Settings
rules.help: Configure the points system, decoration toggles, currency, and per-action awards.
rules.section_general_help: Global on/off switches for the points system and major sub-features.
rules.section_currency_help: How the points name and icon appear across the forum.
rules.section_decorations_help: Each family can be turned off independently — disabling here hides the catalog tab and rejects API requests for that family.
rules.section_placement_help: Where the points badge and equipped decorations show up across the forum UI.
rules.section_awards_help: How many points users earn for each forum action.
rules.user_submissions_enabled_help: When on, registered users can submit their own decoration designs. Every submission lands in the moderation queue for admin approval before reaching the shop. URL-only for avatar/cover families — file uploads stay admin-only.
rules.enabled_help: Master switch. When off, no points are awarded.
rules.auto_group_enabled_help: Automatically promote users to groups when they reach a lifetime point threshold.
rules.lifetime_enabled_help: Lifetime points are a cumulative total of every point ever earned. Unlike balance, lifetime never decreases when points are spent or revoked — it represents the user's total contribution. When off, lifetime totals stay tracked internally (so auto-group tiers keep working) but are hidden from the Rewards page, profile and post header.
rules.show_in_post_header_help: Display a small points badge next to each user's name in posts.
rules.show_in_user_profile_help: Display the points badge on the user profile / user card.
rules.avatar_deco_enabled_help: Master toggle. Wraps avatars with the user's equipped decoration wherever avatars are rendered.
rules.name_deco_enabled_help: Master toggle. Applies the user's equipped style to their displayed name.
rules.cover_deco_enabled_help: Master toggle. Renders the user's equipped cover banner on their profile and user card.
rules.title_deco_enabled_help: Master toggle. Shows the user's equipped title badge next to their name in posts.
rules.post_hl_deco_enabled_help: Master toggle. Wraps the user's posts with their equipped highlight (border/glow/ribbon).
rules.deco_in_posts_help: Apply avatar/name decorations on posts and replies.
rules.deco_in_user_card_help: Apply decorations on the user profile card and hovering.
rules.deco_in_lists_help: Apply decorations on the username inside discussion list items.
rules.avatar_deco_in_lists_help: Apply avatar frames on avatars inside discussion lists. Turn off to keep the list visually cleaner.
rules.hide_badges_with_avatar_deco: Hide user badges when avatar frame is equipped
rules.hide_badges_with_avatar_deco_help: When on, the moderator / admin / custom badges next to the avatar are hidden for users who have an avatar decoration equipped, so the frame stays visually clean.
rules.trade_enabled_help: Master switch for trades. When off, the Trade button and Trades page disappear for all users; pending trades can still be cancelled. Fine-grained access (which groups can trade) is controlled via the `Trade decorations with other users` permission on the Permissions tab.
rules.points_short_help: Short suffix shown next to numbers (e.g. 'pts', '点', '코인'). Defaults to 'pts'.
rules.points_per_discussion_help: Awarded to the author when they open a new discussion.
rules.points_per_post_help: Awarded for each non-OP post the user publishes.
rules.points_per_registration_help: Awarded once when a user registers.
rules.daily_login_bonus_help: Awarded the first time a user is seen each day.

avatar.title: Avatar frame decorations
avatar.help: Upload PNG / GIF / WebP / APNG frames that float over the user's avatar (Discord style).
avatar.field_image_help: Recommended: 256×256 transparent PNG, APNG or GIF. Max 4MB.
avatar.field_image_url_help: Paste a direct https:// image URL. Saves disk on the server, but the remote host must stay reachable for the frame to display.

availability.is_listed_help: When off, this item is hidden from the rewards page. Use it for frames you want to grant to specific users only.
availability.max_claims_help: Once this many claims happen, the item locks out.
availability.dates_help: Leave empty for no time limit. Both ends are optional.
availability.allowed_groups_help: When at least one group is checked, only users in those groups can claim this item. Leave all unchecked for no restriction.

grant.title: Grant {name} to a user
grant.help: Hand this item directly to a user. They get it for free, no points are deducted.
grant.username_help: Type the exact username or display name.
grant.ignore_limit_help: When the item has a max-claims limit, granting normally still counts toward it. Tick this to bypass the limit for this grant.

name.title: Username decorations
name.help: Choose a preset (fire, ice, neon, gradient, etc) or write your own CSS.
name.field_css_help: Two modes. Mode 1 — property list applied directly to the username (e.g. color: gold; font-weight: 700;). Mode 2 — full CSS using & as the selector placeholder; supports @keyframes, pseudo-elements and multiple rules.

title.title: Custom titles
title.help: Short badge text shown next to the username (e.g. "Veteran", "Patron"). Each title can have its own colour and optional custom CSS.
title.field_title_text_help: What users see (max 60 chars). Keep it short — it sits next to the username.
title.field_color_help: CSS colour value (#hex, rgb(), or named). Drives the badge background tint.
title.field_css_help: Same modes as name decorations — property list or full CSS with `&` placeholder.

post_hl.title: Post highlights
post_hl.help: Border / glow / ribbon applied around the user's posts. Choose a built-in preset or write custom CSS.
post_hl.field_css_help: Uses `&` as the selector placeholder (matches the post container).

groups.title: Group offers
groups.help: Expose groups to members through automatic promotion (lifetime threshold) and/or direct purchase (balance deduction). A single group may support both unlock paths.
groups.field_price: Price (points deducted from balance on purchase)
groups.field_is_auto_help: Members are added to this group as soon as their lifetime points meet the threshold below — no purchase required.
groups.field_is_purchasable_help: Members can spend the price below from their balance to join immediately, regardless of lifetime totals.

all_trades.title: All trades
all_trades.help: Every trade in the system across all users. Read-only — see who traded with whom and what was offered.
all_trades.list_help: Newest activity first. Filter by status to focus on disputes or pending sessions.

trade_detail.title: Trade detail
trade_detail.confirm_revert: Revert this trade? Items will be returned to their original owners and points will be refunded. This action cannot be undone.
trade_detail.revert_not_completed: Only completed trades can be reverted. Pending and cancelled trades are already in a non-final state.
trade_detail.reverted_alert: Trade reverted. Items and points were returned to the original owners.
trade_detail.error_revert: The trade could not be reverted.
trade_detail.error_item_re_traded: One of the items moved on after this trade (re-traded, gifted, or admin-transferred). Reverting is unsafe; handle the affected item manually via Award/Grant.

submissions.title: Pending submissions
submissions.help: User-submitted decoration designs waiting on your approval. Approving sets a price and adds the item to the public shop; rejecting hides it from the catalog (the submitter keeps seeing their pending row).

manual.title: Award or revoke points
manual.help: Manually credit or debit a user. Negative amounts deduct from the balance.
manual.field_amount_help: Use a positive number to award, negative to revoke balance only (lifetime is preserved).
